results.title: ACME baseball: Archbold advances to state
results.description: Archbold and Fariview ACME baseball each picked up district championships on Saturday afternoon to advance to next weekend's ACME state tournament in Kalida.

results.title: What is Switzerland’s current FIFA ranking ahead of its 2026 World Cup match vs Argentina?
results.description: Switzerland face Argentina in a crucial 2026 World Cup quarterfinal clash, with a place in the semifinals on the line.

results.title: Why BTS agreed to perform at the FIFA World Cup 2026 halftime show without getting paid? Here's why it's more than a paycheck
results.description: BTS will headline the FIFA World Cup 2026 final halftime show without an appearance fee, supporting the FIFA Global Citizen Education Fund. The performance aligns with the group's charitable values, offers unmatched global exposure, marks FIFA history's first halftime show, highlights their reunion after military service, and adds another milestone to their legacy alongside global music icons.

results.title: Milwaukee Brewers select Florida OF Kyle Jones in 2026 MLB Draft
results.description: Florida outfielder Kyle Jones was selected by the Milwaukee Brewers with the No. 102 overall pick in the 2026 MLB Draft. Jones spent his freshman season at Stetson, where he was named an NCBWA Second Team Freshman All-American.

results.title: Why was Torbjorn Heggem goal disallowed during Norway vs England FIFA World Cup 2026 Quarterfinal?
results.description: Norway thought it had the lead for the second time in the quarterfinal but its joy was cut short after a VAR check.

results.title: Argentina midfield great Rattin dies aged 89
results.description: Argentina great Antonio Rattin, whose sending-off at the 1966 World Cup led to the introduction of red and yellow cards, dies aged 89.

results.title: Bukayo Saka finally ends England problem as Thomas Tuchel plan pays dividends
